word: G5111 - τολμάω - tolmáō - tol-mah'-o - Be bold

sections.paragraph:
τολμάω - tolmaō - tol-mah'-o

From τόλμα tolma (boldness; probably itself from the base of G5056 through the idea of extreme conduct); to venture (objectively or in act; while G2292 is rather subjective or in feeling); by implication to be courageous: - be bold, boldly, dare, durst.
